title: Der Insta-Mord
overview: In August 2022, a young woman is found brutally stabbed to death in her car in Ingolstadt. Then events come thick and fast. The supposed victim is alive, and the victim looks exactly like her, like a doppelganger. Selected and lured via Instagram ...
